catalog_description: Actor lifecycle and interaction events with their output pin signatures.
tags: event beginplay tick overlap damage hit destroyed endplay actor lifecycle

patterns.name: BeginPlay
patterns.description: Fires once when the actor starts playing (after all components are initialized). The most common event for setup logic.
patterns.notes: Target name: ReceiveBeginPlay. No output data pins (exec only).

patterns.name: Tick
patterns.description: Fires every frame while the actor is ticking. The actor must have ticking enabled.
patterns.notes: Target name: ReceiveTick. Output pins: DeltaSeconds (Float).

patterns.name: EndPlay
patterns.description: Fires when the actor is being removed from the world or the game is ending.
patterns.notes: Target name: ReceiveEndPlay. Output pins: EndPlayReason (EEndPlayReason).

patterns.name: ActorBeginOverlap
patterns.description: Fires when another actor begins overlapping this actor. Requires a collision component with Generate Overlap Events enabled.
patterns.notes: Target name: ReceiveActorBeginOverlap. Output pins: OtherActor (Actor).

patterns.name: ActorEndOverlap
patterns.description: Fires when another actor stops overlapping this actor.
patterns.notes: Target name: ReceiveActorEndOverlap. Output pins: OtherActor (Actor).

patterns.name: Hit
patterns.description: Fires when this actor is hit by another actor in a physics collision (blocking hit).
patterns.notes: Target name: ReceiveHit. Output pins: MyComp (PrimitiveComponent), Other (Actor), OtherComp (PrimitiveComponent), NormalImpulse (Vector), Hit (HitResult).

patterns.name: AnyDamage
patterns.description: Fires when the actor receives any type of damage via ApplyDamage.
patterns.notes: Target name: ReceiveAnyDamage. Output pins: Damage (Float), DamageType (DamageType), InstigatedBy (Controller), DamageCauser (Actor).

patterns.name: PointDamage
patterns.description: Fires when the actor receives point damage (e.g., from ApplyPointDamage).
patterns.notes: Target name: ReceivePointDamage. Output pins: Damage (Float), DamageType (DamageType), HitLocation (Vector), HitNormal (Vector), HitComponent (PrimitiveComponent), BoneName (Name), ShotFromDirection (Vector), InstigatedBy (Controller), DamageCauser (Actor), HitInfo (HitResult).

patterns.name: RadialDamage
patterns.description: Fires when the actor receives radial (area-of-effect) damage.
patterns.notes: Target name: ReceiveRadialDamage. Output pins: DamageReceived (Float), DamageType (DamageType), Origin (Vector), HitInfo (HitResult), InstigatedBy (Controller), DamageCauser (Actor).

patterns.name: Destroyed
patterns.description: Fires when DestroyActor is called on this actor, just before actual destruction.
patterns.notes: Target name: ReceiveDestroyed. No output data pins (exec only).
